title: penstemon pahutensis
intro: Penstemon pahutensis, also known as White Globe Gilia or Pahute Penstemon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various health issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Penstemon pahutensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
